mapper.sql: pee.employee_id as pe_id, pee.entry_time, pee.entry_mode, pee.entry_archives_flag, pee.archives_unknown, pee.crime_flag, pee.probation, pee.formal_time, pee.introduction_wages, pee.introduction_situation, pee.archives_address, pee.worked_years, pee.remarks, pee.attribute1, pee.attribute2, pee.attribute3, pee.enabled_flag, pee.id, pee.probation_end_time,pee.assess_flag, pee.create_time, pee.create_by, pee.update_time, pee.update_by

${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_pe_id, ${tAlias}.entry_time as ${tAlias}_entry_time, ${tAlias}.entry_mode as ${tAlias}_entry_mode, ${tAlias}.entry_archives_flag as ${tAlias}_entry_archives_flag, ${tAlias}.archives_unknown as ${tAlias}_archives_unknown, ${tAlias}.crime_flag as ${tAlias}_crime_flag, ${tAlias}.probation as ${tAlias}_probation, ${tAlias}.formal_time as ${tAlias}_formal_time, ${tAlias}.introduction_wages as ${tAlias}_introduction_wages, ${tAlias}.introduction_situation as ${tAlias}_introduction_situation, ${tAlias}.archives_address as ${tAlias}_archives_address, ${tAlias}.worked_years as ${tAlias}_worked_years, ${tAlias}.remarks as ${tAlias}_remarks, ${tAlias}.attribute1 as ${tAlias}_attribute1, ${tAlias}.attribute2 as ${tAlias}_attribute2, ${tAlias}.attribute3 as ${tAlias}_attribute3, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id,${tAlias}.probation_end_time as ${tAlias}_probation_end_time, ${tAlias}.assess_flag as ${tAlias}_assess_flag, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by

select
, fdev.ext_dept_name AS pe_dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS pe_department, fdev.ext_team_name AS pe_team,
,
from pm_employee_entry pee join pm_employee pe on pee.employee_id = pe.id left outer join pm_employee_job pe_pej on pe.id = pe_pej.employee_id and pe_pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pe_pej.enabled_flag = 1 join fnd_job fj on fj.id = pe_pej.job_id and fj.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pe_pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.select: select count(*) from pm_employee_entry pee join pm_employee pe on pee.employee_id = pe.id where 1 = 1
mapper.insert: insert into pm_employee_entry (employee_id, entry_time, entry_mode, entry_archives_flag, archives_unknown, crime_flag, probation, formal_time, introduction_wages, introduction_situation, archives_address, worked_years, remarks, attribute1, attribute2, attribute3, enabled_flag,probation_end_time,assess_flag, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by) values (#{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{entryMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{entryArchivesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{archivesUnknown,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{crimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{probation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{introductionWages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{introductionSituation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{archivesAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workedYears,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT},#{probationEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{assessFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT})
mapper.update: update pm_employee_entry set employee_id = #{employee.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, entry_time = #{entryTime,jdbcType=DATE}, entry_mode = #{entryMode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, entry_archives_flag = #{entryArchivesFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, archives_unknown = #{archivesUnknown,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, crime_flag = #{crimeFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, probation = #{probation,jdbcType=INTEGER}, formal_time = #{formalTime,jdbcType=DATE}, introduction_wages = #{introductionWages,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, introduction_situation = #{introductionSituation,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, archives_address = #{archivesAddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, worked_years = #{workedYears,jdbcType=INTEGER}, remarks = #{remarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute1 = #{attribute1,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute2 = #{attribute2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, attribute3 = #{attribute3,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, assess_flag = #{assessFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, probation_end_time = #{probationEndTime,jdbcType=DATE}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select peen.employee_id as pe_id, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.archives_address) > 0 then peen.archives_address else null end as archives_address, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.archives_unknown) > 0 then peen.archives_unknown else null end as archives_unknown, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.entry_mode) > 0 then peen.entry_mode else null end as entry_mode, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.introduction_situation) > 0 then peen.introduction_situation else null end as introduction_situation, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.introduction_wages) > 0 then peen.introduction_wages else null end as introduction_wages, case when CHARINDEX(#{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR}, peen.remarks) > 0 then peen.remarks else null end as remarks from pm_employee_entry peen join pm_employee pe on pe.id = peen.employee_id where peen.enabled_flag = 1 and pe.enabled_flag = 1 and concat( peen.archives_address,peen.archives_unknown,peen.entry_mode,peen.introduction_situation,peen.introduction_wages,peen.remarks ) like '%' + #{queryValue, jdbcType = VARCHAR} + '%'
